_comment: Calibrated P1 baseline for 4th & Madison (demo fixture). Every value carries unit + source per state-schema.json baseline shape. Energy reported in kWh + kWh/m2 only (no GJ/therms/kBtu) per reporting standard; carbon in tCO2e / kgCO2e/m2. Grid emissions factor held flat across the hold period for baseline-year reporting simplicity (documented assumption -- see citations.json).

gfa_m2.source: Building setup (P0), self-reported GFA, rounded to 2 sig figs for demo

electricity_kwh_yr.source: 12-month utility bill calibration (P1), cross-checked against ESPM export

gas_kwh_yr.source: 12-month fuel delivery/utility bill calibration (P1), converted to kWh-equivalent basis per reporting standard

total_site_eui_kwh_m2_yr.source: Derived: total_site_energy_kwh_yr / gfa_m2, rounded to 2 sig figs

peer_benchmark_eui_kwh_m2_yr.source: Building Performance Database (BPD), filtered: property type Office, comparable climate zone, size class 50,000-100,000 m2 -- median. Peer benchmark used per standard (BPD, never national median).

emissions_tco2e_yr.source: Derived: electricity_kwh_yr x grid emissions factor + gas_kwh_yr x gas emissions factor, rounded to 2 sig figs

emissions_intensity_kgco2e_m2_yr.source: Derived: emissions_tco2e_yr x 1000 / gfa_m2, rounded to 2 sig figs

grid_emissions_factor_kgco2e_kwh.source: eGRID location-based subregion average (demo proxy factor, not tied to a real jurisdiction)

gas_emissions_factor_kgco2e_kwh.source: EPA emissions factor for natural gas, HHV basis, converted to kgCO2e/kWh
